text: VANCE: 'TAKING CARE OF BUSINESS, WILL BE OUT SOON' — Says Iran's conventional military 'effectively destroyed'; pledges gas prices will fall when war ends; Haaretz: Israel accelerating strikes fearing Trump may end war suddenly before Netanyahu's objectives met; Netanyahu pushing for 'ground component' to achieve regime change

text: LEBANON TOLL 1,189: 47 killed in last 24h; 9 paramedics killed in 5 separate Israeli strikes (WHO: 51 medical workers killed total in Lebanon); 4 hospitals + 50+ health centers forced to close; 1,200 Israelis protest in Tel Aviv — 21 arrested; first center-right groups join anti-war rallies

Moshe Katz (22, lone soldier from New Haven CT) killed in south Lebanon

text: AWACS CONFIRMED DESTROYED: Imagery published March 29 shows US E-3G Sentry AWACS (tail 81-0005) fuselage split in two at Prince Sultan AFB — first US strategic aircraft destroyed in combat since Cold War; also 1 KC-135 destroyed + 3 severely damaged; 15 US troops wounded (5 seriously); US AWACS fleet reduced 16→15

Yahya Saree: 'attacks will continue until aggression on all fronts ceases'; 5 active fronts now: US-Iran direct, Hezbollah, Iraq militias, Houthis; Bab al-Mandeb closure threat still active

text: BEERSHEBA HIT + CHEMICAL PLANT FIRE: Iranian ballistic missile strikes residential Beersheba — 11 injured; fragment hits ADAMA chemical plant in Ne'ot Hovav industrial zone, starting fire and triggering chemical leak fears; Home Front Command: stay indoors, Highway 40 closed; hazmat teams deployed; Environment Minister later issues all-clear; also: US-Israeli strike kills 5 at Bandar Khamir port near Strait of Hormuz
